description:
Here's a gameplay snippet of what you can expect in Vampire Crawlers!
There's many familiar faces, places, items and more... but maybe you can spot some new things 🤔

Steam News Post: https://store.steampowered.com/news/app/3265700/view/583907108616931531?l=english

Vampire Crawlers turns the snowballing thrill of Vampire Survivors into a turbo turn‑based, card‑driven BLOBBER with rogue-lite elements 

Coming in 2026 (or whenever we think it's ready)

Vampire Crawlers will also be coming to Xbox Game Pass Day One!

Nosebleed Interactive are working closely with us on Vampire Crawlers. More details on their involvement will be shared closer to launch!

Pick up your garlic & join our Discord community 🧄
https://discord.gg/vampire-survivors

🔥 Wishlist now 🔥
🎮 Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3265700/Vampire_Crawlers_The_Turbo_Wildcard_from_Vampire_Survivors/
💚 Xbox: https://www.xbox.com/en-GB/games/store/vampire-crawlers-the-turbo-wildcard-from-vampire-survivors/9nmpvj7tcfd0
💙 PlayStation: https://store.playstation.com/en-gb/concept/10015481

Also coming to Nintendo Switch, Android & iOS!

https://poncle.games/vampire-crawlers

Check out our new poncle Games discord 🎮
http://discord.gg/RpnG5Y5JKV

Follow Vampire Survivors for more updates:
https://twitter.com/poncle_vampire
https://www.tiktok.com/@poncle_games
https://www.instagram.com/ponclegames/

🔗 https://beacons.ai/poncle

Vampire Survivors by poncle
Vampire Crawlers by poncle

#VampireCrawlers #VampireSurvivors #poncle
